titleStmt.title: SII 10.172: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 172. (A.R. No. 657 of 1920.) ON A PILLAR LYING IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF CHŌḌĒŚVARA, MOPAṞṞU, SAME TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 109[2].

summary.p: States that Gōka the general of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kulōttuṅga Rājēndra-Chōḍa granted 110 sheep for two perpetual lamps and his wife Gōkasāni granted 55 sheep for one perpetual lamp in the temple of Chōḍēśvara of Mrōmpaṟṟu. States also that land was given for naivēdyam to the deity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śakābdaṁbulu 1092 A
gu nēṁṭi viṣvusaṁkrāṁttini
mittamuna śrīmanmahāma
ṁḍalēśvara kulōttuṁggarā
jēṁdracōḍayarājula pa
ḍavālu goṁkaya tama ta
ṁḍri cōḍapanāyakunikiṁ
dama talli kaṭṭasāniki dharmmu
vugānuṁ dama netturuviddha
nu mrōmpaṟtanu śrīcōḍēśvara
mahādēvaraku guḍi yetti
ṁcci Akhaṁḍavarttidīpamulu reṁ
ṭiki naṁdula rabōyini va
samunaṁ beṭṭina goṟiyalu
110 vīniṁ jēkoni putrānu
pautrika mācaṁdrārkkamu 2
Aḍḍeṁḍu neyi vōsi naḍapa
ṁggalavāru . Īdēvaraku
gōkasāni dana penmiṭi gōkinā
yakunikiṁ danakunu dharmmā
rtthamugānu Akhaṁḍavarttidī
pamu Okkaṁṭiki mūlpūri
prōlebōyini vasamunaṁ
beṭṭina goṟiyalu 55 vīniṁ
jēkoni putrānupautrika māca
ṁdrārkamu nitya māneṁḍu neyi
vōsi naḍapaṁgalavāru .
cōḍēśvaramahādēvaraku ni
vēdyapaḍikiniṁ beṭṭina bhū
mi kha 7 . Īdēvadattitōḍi
kānu brahmapurimallanabhaṭla
ku bhūmi kha 1 na 10 . svadattaṁ
paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasu
ṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
diviyakāṁpulu
dalalēni daṁḍi mā
nika neyi vōya
ṁggalavāru śrī .
Digital edition of SII 10.172 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
